# Callisto Arts — Portfolio

> Official portfolio of Frédérique Charton (Callisto): digital art, demoscene graphics, paintover, and professional work — Manager at GPO SARL, digital artist and AI builder.

This site is a static portfolio (HTML/CSS/JS) hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Sections include hero, portfolio gallery with filters and lightbox, about, journey timeline, and contact. **Build Log** (`build-log.html`) is a public technical journal — proof-of-work write-ups (problem → approach → result). Social links appear in the fixed rail on the right. Image metadata and gallery content are driven by `assets/images/portfolio_images.json`.

## Optional

- [README (repository)](https://github.com/GamePartsOnline/Portfolio-Callisto/blob/main/README.md): setup, structure, and how to add artworks.
- [Legal notices / cookies](https://portfolio.callistoarts.com/mentions-legales.html): mentions légales and cookie preferences.

## Site map

- [Sitemap](https://portfolio.callistoarts.com/sitemap.xml): URLs for crawlers.
- [Robots](https://portfolio.callistoarts.com/robots.txt): crawling rules.
